title: Light Roasted Mediterranean Tofu Salad
description: A delicate, flavorful salad perfect for brunch, made with light-roasted tofu, tangy pickle, and a hint of Mediterranean herbs.

ingredients.name: Pickle Slices
ingredients.notes: any type, such as dill or sweet

instructions: Place the tofu on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the tofu is roasting, chop the cucumber, bell pepper, and red onion.
In a bowl, combine the chopped vegetables, pickle slices, and chopped fresh herbs.
Once the tofu is done roasting, let it cool slightly before cutting it into small cubes.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl with the vegetables.
Drizzle the salad with olive oil and lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve on a tagliere or a large plate.
Garnish with a sprinkle of sumac, if desired.
